info.title: LogicalModels Enumeration API
info.description: API endpoint providing an enumeration of all available Logical Model schemas

get.summary: Get enumeration of all logical_model schemas
get.description: Returns a list of all available logical_model schemas with metadata

schemas.title: Medication Overview (Minimal)
schemas.description: Minimal medication overview payload for use within a QR code payload. Based on the IHE Pharmacy Medication Overview logical model, with short element labels (one or two letters) and simple data

schemas.title: Medication Treatment Line (Minimal)
schemas.description: Minimal medication treatment line payload for use within a QR code payload. Based on the IHE Pharmacy Medication Treatment Line logical model, with short element labels (one or two letters) and simple data types suitable for encoding in a compact QR code payload.

EnumerationResponse.title: Logical Model Enumeration Schema
EnumerationResponse.description: JSON Schema defining the structure of the Logical Model enumeration endpoint response

schemas.title: Medication Overview (Minimal)
schemas.description: Minimal medication overview payload for use within a QR code payload. Based on the IHE Pharmacy Medication Overview logical model, with short element labels (one or two letters) and simple data

schemas.title: Medication Treatment Line (Minimal)
schemas.description: Minimal medication treatment line payload for use within a QR code payload. Based on the IHE Pharmacy Medication Treatment Line logical model, with short element labels (one or two letters) and simple data types suitable for encoding in a compact QR code payload.
